market.nifty_session_note: Opened gap-down 477 pts to 23,573; recovered 269 pts to close 23,842. Better than feared.
market.sensex: Crashed 1,653 pts at open, partial recovery
market.crude_wti: $97.22 (pulled back from $104.35 — 2nd-round talks signal, ceasefire holds to Apr 22)
market.cpi_march_2026: 3.4% (benign; below feared 3.6-3.8%; within RBI comfort zone)

scenarios.name: Ceasefire Holds + Blockade Reversed
scenarios.summary: Upgraded from 5%. WTI pulled back to $97 on holiday — 2nd-round talks being explored, ceasefire nominally holds to Apr 22. Still not base case but probability raised. Requires formal blockade reversal.

scenarios.name: Hormuz Tense — Crude $95-110
scenarios.summary: DOMINANT (revised). WTI $97 (down from $104.35) signals partial de-escalation pricing. Blockade in effect but ceasefire technical hold. Market likely to stabilise unless new kinetic action. Nifty range widens — less bearish than $104+ scenario.

scenarios.name: CPI Benign + Crude Plateau — Stabilisation
scenarios.summary: CPI 3.4% confirmed benign Apr 13. WTI pullback to $97 = inflation relief for May/June prints. If crude stays $90-100 range, June RBI cut odds recover to 50%+. Reliance Q4 beat could catalyse recovery leg.

signals.rationale: CONFIRMED WORKING. Apr 13: held up as defensive anchor while market sold -0.87%. Thesis intact — zero crude sensitivity, 3%+ dividend yield floor. HOLD through holiday gap. Zero reason to trim.
signals.risk: Lags if market stages sharp recovery. Accept as insurance cost.

signals.rationale: PARTIALLY WORKING. BPCL -4% (short leg ✅). ONGC only -2% (long leg underperformed — windfall tax re-imposition risk caps upside despite WTI $104). Downgrade long leg conviction to 4. Maintain pair but watch OMC pricing policy update.
signals.risk: Windfall tax re-imposition on ONGC above $75/bbl — already threatening. Crude drop on OPEC+ surprise.

signals.rationale: IN THE MONEY at Apr 13 open (Nifty hit 23,573). Payout confirmed. ACTION REQUIRED: Book 50-75% of position before Apr 15 open (theta decay overnight holiday). Hold remaining 25-50% for gap risk if crude spikes $110+ over holiday weekend.
signals.risk: If Reliance Q4 blows out estimates + crude stabilises, Nifty could gap up Apr 15, eroding remaining position.

signals.rationale: Energy security thesis confirmed. WTI $104 + Hormuz closed = coal demand locked in for winter season. Domestic coal = zero import cost, zero Hormuz exposure. ~6% dividend yield. Status update pending — watch Apr 15 session.
signals.risk: Regulatory overhang on coal pricing. ESG exclusion limits re-rating ceiling.

signals.rationale: CONFIRMED WORKING. Apr 13: -6% ✅. ATF cost shock confirmed at WTI $104. Jet fuel 35-40% of operating cost — Q4 margins under severe pressure. Q1 FY27 likely reports PAT loss if crude stays $100+. HOLD short. Add on any bounce.
signals.risk: Fuel hedges may partially cushion one quarter. Crude reversal is tail risk.

signals.rationale: USD/INR 92.60 (slightly stronger than 93.73 — some Rupee recovery). Hold existing positions. Do not add before Infosys Apr 23 guidance (binary event — 2-6% growth range signals uncertainty). Wipro Apr 16 results first read.
signals.risk: Global risk-off hits IT discretionary spend. US tariffs (26%) compound macro headwinds.

signals.rationale: CPI 3.4% benign = June rate cut still alive = banking thesis intact. Conviction upgrade 2→3. Banking sector sold Apr 13 on broad macro — NOT earnings-specific. Q4 results Apr 18 (react Apr 20). NIM >3.65% is the trigger. Start accumulating NOW on weakness before Apr 18.
signals.risk: Holiday gap into Apr 15 F&O expiry could see another leg down. Size carefully.

avoid.reason: CONFIRMED. Apr 13: -4%. WTI $104.35 = GRM losses deepening further. Under-recovery fears real. OMC pricing decision pending. Structural short, not a dip to buy. BPCL short (via pair) working ✅.
Crude derivatives (TiO2, pigments, solvents) = 55-60% of raw material costs. WTI $104 = margin compression locked in for Q1 FY27. Avoid new longs.

CPI 3.4% was benign — partially lifts the immediate bear case. BUT WTI $104 will push CPI higher in coming months. June cut now uncertain, not cancelled. Avoid adding; wait for crude clarity post Apr 15.

avoid.stock: NBFCs — high wholesale funding (Bajaj Finance, Shriram, Muthoot)
avoid.reason: CPI 3.4% benign is a mild positive. But crude $104 trajectory = inflation risk persists. June cut probability maybe 40% (not 60%). Don't chase NBFC longs yet — wait for Apr 28 FOMC + RBI June policy clarity.
ATF cost shock confirmed (WTI $104). IndiGo -6% Apr 13. SpiceJet, Akasa also structurally impaired. Avoid all aviation longs; IndiGo short is active.

avoid.stock: Chasing F&O expiry rallies on Apr 15
avoid.reason: Apr 15 = F&O expiry + Reliance results. Any gap-up on Reliance beat will be a sell-the-news. WTI $104 macro backdrop unchanged. Any rally into expiry is a hedged sell, not a momentum buy.

calendar.event: Weekly F&O expiry + Reliance Q4 FY26 results
HDFC Bank + ICICI Bank Q4 results (react Mon Apr 20)

tracker.title: US-Iran Ceasefire & Strait of Hormuz
tracker.india_impact: CRITICAL. IRGC attacked 21+ merchant vessels (Apr 12-13). Sea mines planted. Hormuz functionally closed. WTI $104.35 (Brent $102.26). Apr 13: Nifty absorbed shock, closed -0.87% vs feared -2%+. Holiday gap Apr 14 into F&O expiry Apr 15 = next binary. OMC structural losses ongoing.
tracker.watch_for: WTI $110 (next escalation tier). IRGC further kinetic action. US military response. OPEC+ emergency supply. India OMC pricing review.

tracker.title: US Tariff & India Trade Dynamics
tracker.india_impact: 26% reciprocal tariff on Indian goods effective Apr 9. Nifty fell 5.9% Apr 7. FIIs sold Rs 22,000 cr in one week. Pharma, gems/jewellery, textiles, auto components exposed. Combined with Hormuz = double structural headwind.
tracker.watch_for: US-India negotiation. Pharma exemption. FII flow reversal. Rupee past 94.

tracker.title: Q4 FY26 Earnings Season
tracker.india_impact: TCS +29% beat, fell 2% post results — sell-the-news confirmed. Reliance Q4 Apr 15 (IMMINENT). HDFC Bank + ICICI Bank Apr 18 (react Apr 20). Wipro Apr 16, HCL Tech Apr 21, Infosys Apr 23. CPI 3.4% benign = banking NIM thesis alive.
tracker.watch_for: Reliance Apr 15 — Jio 5G subscribers + Retail EBITDA margin. HDFC Bank NIM >3.65% (Apr 18). Infosys FY27 guidance (Apr 23) — binary.

tracker.title: Crude Oil Volatility
tracker.india_impact: WTI $104.35. Hormuz closed. Bloomberg $110-120 if closure persists. GRMs -$9.4 — refiners in structural losses. IndiGo -6% Apr 13 confirms ATF cost shock. Rupee at 92.60. Every $10 crude rise = Rs 8-10/litre OMC subsidy pressure.
tracker.watch_for: WTI $110. OPEC+ emergency supply call. India OMC pricing decision. Holiday news flow (Apr 14).

tracker.title: RBI Monetary Policy Path
tracker.india_impact: UPDATED: CPI 3.4% benign (Apr 13) — June cut still alive. BUT WTI $104 will push forward CPI higher. June cut probability ~40%. RBI held at 5.25%. Next MPC June 3-5.
tracker.watch_for: Crude trajectory through May (determines June CPI). April CPI release (mid-May). FOMC Apr 28-29.

tracker.title: FII Flows & Rupee
tracker.india_impact: FIIs pulled Rs 1.04 lakh cr YTD. Rupee 92.60 (slight improvement from 93.73 pre-session). CPI 3.4% benign = mild positive for FII return. But crude $104 + tariffs = structural headwind. Past 94 = accelerated exits.
tracker.watch_for: Apr 15 FII/DII provisional data. USD/INR past 94. FOMC Apr 28-29.
